java.lang.Runnable, java.io.Serializable, javax.swing.WindowConstants public class RunScript extends ExecuteDialog RunScript is a modal dialog box which runs the given Python script and provides a Cancel button to interrupt it. Before running the

ncel button to interrupt it. Before running the script, this always sets up the Python variables control and tools as the OrthoTweezersControl and OrthoTweezersTools, repectively. See Also: Serialized Form Inner classes inherited from class javax.

java.lang.String script) Creates new modal RunScript dialog box. When the user presses the Run button, this runs the given Python script. The algorithm is run in a separate thread and the user can cancel. Parameters: parent

hread and the user can cancel. Parameters: parent - The parent Frame console - The InteractiveConsole which has already been set up with the global variables control, tools and the easy access functions as in OrthoTweezers.establi

ss functions as in OrthoTweezers.establishConsole(). script - The script the run, such as returned by ScriptEditor.getText(). Method Detail execute public void execute () throws CancelException This is called when the new threa
